text.title: Strategy Analysis — Future State — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to produce the artefact end-to-end.

step.name: anchor-outcomes
step.action: List target outcomes, each traced to a need metric.

step.name: derive-capabilities
step.action: Per outcome: capabilities required to deliver it.

step.name: constrain
step.action: Document constraints (regulatory / contractual / technical / cultural) bounding the future state.
